zh.lifeSummary: Hermione Billard-Nessie於1390年出生在英國越可爾。她於1409年與Charles Aldborough在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1443年在英國英格蘭越可爾普倫普頓 白 艾可萊薩爾享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hermione
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name borne in classical mythology by a daughter of Helen and Menelaus, who grew up to marry her cousin Orestes. It is evidently a derivative of Hermes, name of the messenger god, but the formation is not clear. The name was used by Shakespeare for one of the main characters in A Winter's Tale ( 1610 ), and is still in occasional use.

en.lifeSummary: Hermione Billard-Nessie was born in 1390, in Yorkshire, England. She married Charles Aldborough in 1409, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1443, in Plumpton by Ecclesall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

ja.lifeSummary: Hermione Billard-Nessieは1390年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた。1409年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン ビー エククレサルでCharles Aldboroughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1443年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン ビー エククレサルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hermione Billard-Nessie(은)는 1390년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사에서 Charles Aldborough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 플럼프턴 비 c클사에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Hermione Billard-Nessie родилась в 1390 г. в местности еркшир, Англия.
